known_issues.description: Rendering layout anomalies. Suspected runtime substrate drift: app built against Electron 32-41, substituted with Electron 28.3.3. Compositor and BrowserView semantics mismatch likely.
Uses custom-named 'Codex Framework.framework' instead of standard 'Electron Framework.framework'. Requires ElectronAsarIntegrity plist detection and compat-db override for Electron tier recognition.

workarounds.description: Substitute Linux-native Codex CLI backend via CODEX_CLI_PATH environment variable. Required because bundled CLI is macOS arm64 Mach-O.

notes: Launches and renders via Electron 28 runtime substitution with rendering anomalies. Rebranded Electron framework requires detection overrides. CLI backend requires Linux-native binary substitution. Rendering issues likely resolvable via Electron 41 substrate (see RUNTIME_NEGOTIATION.md).
